title: arenaria conimbricensis var. loscosii
intro: Arenaria conimbricensis var. loscosii, also known as loscos' sandwort, is a plant species within the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It is used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help in soothing skin irritations and wounds. The medicinal properties of Arenaria conimbricensis var. loscosii are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing, making it beneficial for treating conditions such as eczema, dermatitis, and minor burns. The plant is traditionally prepared as an infusion or tincture, and its health benefits can be further enhanced by using it topically or internally in moderation, under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
